Shield-Eater Extract

Triggers: 4 sec

Scorching Heat
The artifact owner blows up all enemy units with shields and damage-reducing effects. The explosion deals 350000 pure damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The artifact owner also starts incinerating the main targets for 3 sec. The enemy units take 125000 pure damage every second for 3 sec, and all enemy units in a small radius around the incinerated enemies take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the initial targets. When the incineration effect ends, the targets become weakened. Their max health, physical and magic armor, and fortitude are reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚
